# services.invidious-router

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.invidious-router`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.invidious-router.address` | `string` | Address on which invidious-router should listen on. |
| `services.invidious-router.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the invidious-router service. |
| `services.invidious-router.nginx.domain` | `string` | The domain on which invidious-router should be served. |
| `services.invidious-router.nginx.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Automatic nginx proxy configuration . |
| `services.invidious-router.nginx.extraDomains` | `list of string` | Additional domains to serve invidious-router on. |
| `services.invidious-router.package` | `package` | The invidious-router package to use. |
| `services.invidious-router.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port to bind to. |
| `services.invidious-router.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Configuration for invidious-router. Check <https://gitlab.com/gaincoder/invidious-router#configuration> for configuration options. |
